risks.title: Secrets rotation evidence missing for release packet
risks.description: Release sign-off can proceed without attached secret-rotation artifacts when reviewers do not verify workflow outputs.
risks.mitigationPlan: Enforce launch-readiness checklist item requiring secret-rotation artifact link and validate packet completeness in release sign-off.

risks.title: Emergency auth fallback environment-variable compromise
risks.description: If deployment secret controls are bypassed, break-glass auth fallback could be activated and increase token-verification attack surface.
risks.mitigationPlan: Structured fallback audit events, auth_fallback_activations_total alerting, and strict secret-injection policy with no default env enablement.
